articles.author: Sarah Shamim
articles.title: First US screwworm case in 60 years: Should America be worried? - Al Jazeera
articles.description: The US Department of Agriculture says New World screwworm has been detected in a Texas calf.
articles.content:
The New World screwworm, a flesheating parasite which infects cattle and other warmblooded animals, has been found in a calf in Texas, the US Department of Agriculture announced on Wednesday.
